name: BuzzFeed, Inc.
summary: PART I For convenience, the terms BuzzFeed, the Company, we, us, or our used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K refer to BuzzFeed, Inc. and one or more of our consolidated subsidiaries, unless the context otherwise requires. On December 3, 2021, we consummated a business combination (the Business Combination) with 890 5th Avenue Partners, Inc. (890), certain wholly-owned subsidiaries of 890, and BuzzFeed, Inc., a Delaware corporation (Legacy BuzzFeed). In connection with the Business Combination...
